chapter_title.en: The Obligation of the jumu’ah Prayer, Its Virtue, Who is Exempt From it, and the Prayer and Sermon Therein

text: 1254 - وَقَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: « اَلسَّبْتُ لِبَنِي هَاشِمٍ وَ اَلْأَحَدُ لِبَنِي أُمَيَّةَ فَاتَّقُوا أَخْذَ اَلْأَحَدِ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1254 - Imam (as) said:
"Saturday is for the Banu Hashim, and Sunday is for the Banu Umayyah, so beware of taking Sunday”.
